name: PlayerPedId
description: Returns the ped entity handle for the local player.

name: GetPlayerPed
description: Returns the ped entity handle for a given player ID.

name: GetEntityCoords
description: Returns the current coordinates of the specified entity.

name: SetEntityCoords
description: Sets the coordinates of an entity.

name: GetEntityHeading
description: Returns the heading (rotation around Z axis) of the entity.

name: SetEntityHeading
description: Sets the heading of the entity.

name: GetEntityModel
description: Returns the model hash of the entity.

name: DeleteEntity
description: Deletes the specified entity.

name: DoesEntityExist
description: Returns whether the entity exists.

name: GetEntityHealth
description: Returns the current health of the entity.

name: SetEntityHealth
description: Sets the health of the entity.

name: IsEntityDead
description: Returns whether the entity is dead.

name: CreateVehicle
description: Creates a vehicle at the specified position.

name: GetVehiclePedIsIn
description: Returns the vehicle the ped is currently in. Pass true for last vehicle.

name: IsPedInAnyVehicle
description: Returns whether the ped is in any vehicle.

name: SetVehicleNumberPlateText
description: Sets the license plate text on a vehicle (max 8 characters).

name: GetVehicleNumberPlateText
description: Returns the license plate text of the vehicle.

name: SetVehicleEngineOn
description: Turns the vehicle engine on or off.

name: SetVehicleDoorOpen
description: Opens a specific door on the vehicle.

name: RegisterCommand
description: Registers a chat command. If restricted is true, requires ACE permission.

name: TriggerServerEvent
description: Triggers an event on the server from the client.

name: TriggerClientEvent
description: Triggers an event on a specific client from the server.

name: TriggerEvent
description: Triggers a local event (not sent over the network).

name: RegisterNetEvent
description: Registers a handler for a network event.

name: GetHashKey
description: Returns a hash of the input string. Use backtick syntax in Lua for compile-time hashing.

name: GetPlayerName
description: Returns the name of the player.

name: GetPlayerIdentifiers
description: Returns a table of all identifiers for the player (license, steam, discord, etc.).

name: GetNumPlayerIdentifiers
description: Returns the number of identifiers for the player.

name: GetPlayerIdentifier
description: Returns a specific identifier for the player by index.

name: DropPlayer
description: Drops (kicks) a player from the server with a reason message.

name: GetPlayers
description: Returns a table of all connected player IDs.

name: SendNUIMessage
description: Sends a message (table/JSON) to the NUI browser.

name: RegisterNUICallback
description: Registers a callback that can be invoked from the NUI browser via fetch.

name: SetNuiFocus
description: Sets NUI keyboard focus and cursor visibility.

name: Wait
description: Yields the current thread for the specified number of milliseconds.

name: CreateThread
description: Creates a new coroutine thread.

name: GetGameTimer
description: Returns the number of milliseconds since the game started.

name: GetCurrentResourceName
description: Returns the name of the currently executing resource.

name: GetResourceState
description: Returns the state of a resource (started, stopped, etc.).

name: AddBlipForCoord
description: Creates a map blip at the given coordinates.

name: SetBlipSprite
description: Sets the sprite (icon) for a blip.

name: SetBlipColour
description: Sets the color of a blip.

name: SetBlipScale
description: Sets the display scale of a blip.

name: BeginTextCommandSetBlipName
description: Begins setting a custom name for a blip. Follow with AddTextComponentSubstringPlayerName and EndTextCommandSetBlipName.

name: RemoveBlip
description: Removes a blip from the map.

name: DrawMarker
description: Draws a 3D marker at the specified position. Must be called every frame.

name: RequestModel
description: Requests loading of a model. Must wait until HasModelLoaded returns true.

name: HasModelLoaded
description: Returns whether the model has finished loading.

name: SetModelAsNoLongerNeeded
description: Marks the model as no longer needed, allowing the engine to unload it.

name: IsControlJustPressed
description: Returns whether a control was just pressed this frame.
